title: Uncover Product Insights: Analyze User Funnels
description: Transform scattered user interactions into strategic insights that drive product decisions. This course empowers you with the analytical expertise to systematically interpret product surfaces, establish robust tracking frameworks, and diagnose performance drops through sophisticated funnel analysis. You'll master the art of translating user-facing features into measurable events, creating standardized taxonomies that capture meaningful behavioral data, and conducting root cause analysis when metrics decline. By completing this course, you'll confidently lead analytics implementations, identify friction points that impact conversion rates, and present actionable recommendations to cross-functional teams. This course is unique because it bridges the gap between technical implementation and strategic business impact, teaching you to think like both an analyst and a product strategist. To be successful in this course, you should have basic experience with data analytics and familiarity with product interfaces.
